dbo.cf_business_processes.summary: Business process definition records for Forms process models.
safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only process inventory and definition-level reporting.
Join to instance and form mapping tables only after validating the target Forms version.
Use for read-only inventories of Forms process definitions, activation state, retention settings, and storage configuration.
Join to cf_bp_main_instances through process identifiers when reporting process definition details alongside runtime instances.
Use business process definition records for read-only Forms metadata reporting.
warnings: Do not modify process definition records directly.
Process definition internals are version-sensitive.
Do not update process definition records directly; changes must be made through supported Forms administration tools.
Columns containing serialized style, notification, or testing configuration should be treated as internal implementation details unless separately verified.

bp_id.purpose: Likely primary identifier for a business process definition.

date_created.purpose: Timestamp when the process definition record was created.

description.purpose: Process description entered for the process definition.

date_updated.purpose: Timestamp when the process definition record was last changed.

is_activated.purpose: Flag indicating whether the process definition is active.

is_deleted.purpose: Read-only soft-removal flag for the process definition.

is_archived.purpose: Archive flag for the process definition.

status_date_updated.purpose: Timestamp for the most recent process status change.

tenant_id.purpose: Tenant identifier associated with the process definition.

created_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the account that created the process definition.

updated_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the account that last changed the process definition.

status_updated_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the account tied to the latest process status change.

pm_updated_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the account tied to the latest process model change.

instance_data_retention_enabled.purpose: Flag indicating whether submitted instance data retention rules are enabled.

instance_data_retention_days.purpose: Configured number of days for submitted instance data retention.

instance_stats_retention_enabled.purpose: Flag indicating whether instance statistics retention rules are enabled.

instance_stats_retention_days.purpose: Configured number of days for instance statistics retention.

keep_analytics_data.purpose: Flag indicating whether analytics data is retained.

unique_id.purpose: Stable unique identifier for the process definition.

storage_type.purpose: Configured storage type for process attachments or saved data.

volume_id.purpose: Volume identifier used for process storage configuration.

attachment_migration_status.purpose: Status value for attachment storage migration.

testing_rules.purpose: Serialized testing configuration; meaning should be verified before reporting.

is_triggerpublic.purpose: Flag indicating whether the business process definition triggerpublic.

update_option.purpose: Change behavior option for the business process definition.

is_savetolf.purpose: Flag indicating whether the business process definition savetolf.

friendly_bp_id_col.purpose: Friendly Business Process Identifier Col for the business process definition record.

savetolf_format.purpose: Savetolf Format setting for the business process definition record.

is_savetolf_xml_included.purpose: Flag indicating whether the business process definition savetolf XML included.

faq_options.purpose: Serialized or free-form FAQ options payload for the business process definition record; verify structure before reporting.

faq_group_id.purpose: FAQ Group identifier associated with the business process definition record.

faq_group_name.purpose: FAQ Group Name for the business process definition record.

custom_error_msg.purpose: Custom Error Msg for the business process definition record.

is_terminal_notification_enabled.purpose: Flag indicating whether the business process definition terminal notification enabled.

terminal_email_template.purpose: Numeric value for terminal email template on the business process definition record.

is_suspend_notification_enabled.purpose: Flag indicating whether the business process definition suspend notification enabled.

suspend_email_template.purpose: Email-related value for suspend email template on the business process definition record; review for sensitive content before reporting.

pm_date_updated.purpose: Timestamp or date value for process model date updated on the business process definition record.

hide_history_from_initiator.purpose: Flag indicating whether to hide history from initiator for the business process definition.

hide_history_from_participant.purpose: Flag indicating whether to hide history from participant for the business process definition.

safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only process instance status and lifecycle reporting.
Prefer SQL foreign keys and exported metadata when joining to related runtime tables.
Use with cf_bp_worker_instances when reporting on suspended, interrupted, or terminated task state.
Use process instance records for read-only Forms metadata reporting.
The status column stores the main Forms process instance lifecycle state. Use worker instance state as well when reporting suspended or task-level conditions.
warnings: Do not update runtime instance records directly.
Forms instance monitoring status is calculated with worker instance state; do not interpret this column by itself for suspended-task reporting.
RunningWithSuspendedTask = 6 is a Forms application state label and does not actually exist as a stored value in cf_bp_main_instances.status.

bp_instance_id.purpose: Likely primary identifier for a process instance.

status.purpose: Main Forms process instance lifecycle status. Values: 1 = Running (instance still in progress), 2 = Complete (instance is done), 3 = Canceled (instance was canceled), 4 = TerminatedByError (instance was terminated due to a non-recoverable error), 5 = TerminatedByEndEvent (instance ended from a terminate end event), 6 = RunningWithSuspendedTask (application state label only; does not actually exist in the database), 99 = Archived (deleted instances).

ref_bp_instance_id.purpose: Reference identifier used to relate this instance to another process instance.

process_id.purpose: Identifier for the process definition or process version that created the instance.

start_date.purpose: Timestamp when the process instance started.

end_date.purpose: Timestamp when the process instance ended, when applicable.

title.purpose: Display title for the process instance.

user_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the instance initiator.

lastacted_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the most recent actor on the instance.

lastacted_date.purpose: Timestamp of the most recent recorded action on the instance.

lastacted_comment.purpose: Comment from the most recent recorded action on the instance.

bp_name.purpose: Process name copied onto the runtime instance for reporting and display.

submission_data_removed.purpose: Flag indicating submitted data was removed by retention or cleanup logic.

stats_removed.purpose: Flag indicating instance statistics were removed by retention or cleanup logic.

is_test_mode.purpose: Flag indicating the instance was created in Forms test mode.

dbo.cf_bp_worker_instances.summary: Runtime worker or routing instance records used with main process instances to determine detailed Forms instance state.
safeReportingNotes: Use with cf_bp_main_instances for read-only monitoring of suspended, interrupted, terminated, and running-with-error Forms instances.
A main instance can be running while one or more worker instances are suspended, so worker status should be considered for monitoring views.
Use worker instance records for read-only Forms metadata reporting.
The status column stores the current execution/routing state for a worker instance step in a Forms process instance.
warnings: Do not update runtime worker instance records directly.
Status values are sourced from a Laserfiche Answers discussion and should be verified against the target Forms version before operational alerting.
Some worker statuses are transient and may be overwritten quickly as Forms advances the process.

status.purpose: Forms worker instance step status. Values: 1 = Ready (step is ready to start), 2 = WaitForTrigger (requires an event before moving on, such as a user task or intermediate timer event), 3 = Running (step is currently running, such as running Workflow), 4 = StepExecuted (usually transient after a task or timer is executed and quickly overwritten by the next step), 5 = Sleep (worker instance sleeps while another starts in a subprocess), 6 = Split (gateway splitting to multiple paths), 7 = Merged (gateway merged from multiple branches), 8 = Complete (step fully executed), 9 = Terminate (step was terminated before completion), 10 = Interrupted (task was stopped due to an interrupt), 11 = SuspendedDueToError (service task could not complete), 12 = Free (task is assigned to multiple users; not used), 13 = SuspendedDueToTaskError (user task is suspended).

instance_id.purpose: Primary identifier for a runtime worker instance.

instance_type.purpose: Worker instance type value used by Forms runtime routing.

ref_instance_id.purpose: Reference identifier relating this worker instance to another worker instance.

current_process_id.purpose: Current process definition or process version identifier for the worker instance.

current_step_id.purpose: Current step identifier for the worker instance.

update_date.purpose: Timestamp when this worker instance was last changed.

parent_instance_id.purpose: Parent worker instance identifier for nested or branched runtime paths.

is_tobeterminated.purpose: Flag indicating the worker instance is marked for termination.

group_id.purpose: Group identifier associated with the worker instance.

deprecated_current_priority.purpose: Deprecated priority value retained for older runtime behavior; avoid new reporting unless verified.

updated_by_snapshotid.purpose: User snapshot identifier associated with the latest worker instance change.

dbo.cf_bp_worker_instnc_to_resume.summary: Resume or pending-task assignment records associated with worker instances.
safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only reporting on resumable or pending user task assignments after validating joins to worker instances and user snapshots.
Use resumable task assignment records for read-only Forms metadata reporting.
The status column stores claim, lock, cancellation, ownership, and suspension state for resumable Forms tasks.
The status column mapping is: 1 New, 2 Locked, 3 Canceled, 4 Deleted, 5 Ready, 6 Suspended.
Status value mapping updated from Laserfiche Answers clarification.
warnings: Do not update resume or task assignment records directly.
Use this table for read-only task availability and assignment diagnostics only; do not infer final process completion from resume-task status alone.

status.purpose: Forms resumable worker/task status. Values: 1 = New (task is available to be claimed), 2 = Locked (task is about to be processed, such as running Workflow), 3 = Canceled (process or instance was canceled), 4 = Deleted, 5 = Ready (task is owned), 6 = Suspended (task was unable to be assigned to a user or team).

resume_id.purpose: Primary identifier for the resume or pending-task assignment row.

worker_instance_id.purpose: Worker instance associated with this resume or pending-task row.

step_id.purpose: Step identifier associated with the resumable task.

step_name.purpose: Step display name copied onto the resumable task row.

form_id.purpose: Form identifier associated with the task.

resume_count.purpose: Count of resume attempts or resume records associated with the task.

last_submission_id.purpose: Most recent submission associated with this resumable task.

draft_id.purpose: Draft submission identifier associated with this resumable task.

team_id.purpose: Team identifier associated with the task assignment.

owner_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the current task owner.

due_date.purpose: Due date for the resumable task.

current_priority.purpose: Priority value for the resumable task.

date_created.purpose: Timestamp when the resume or task assignment row was created.

assign_date.purpose: Timestamp when the task was assigned.

form_name.purpose: Form name copied onto the task assignment row.

form_uid.purpose: Stable form unique identifier copied onto the task assignment row.

dbo.cf_submissions.summary: Form submission records captured by Forms.
safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only submission counts, timestamps, and status reporting.
Validate joins to form, process, and field data tables per Forms version.
Use for read-only submission timelines, submitter snapshots, action names, comments, and test-mode filtering.
Use form submission action records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include user-entered or sensitive content.
warnings: Do not insert, update, or delete submission records directly.
Do not update submission records directly; submitted values may include sensitive user-entered data.

submission_id.purpose: Primary identifier for a Forms submission.

date_created.purpose: Timestamp when the submission was created.

action.purpose: Submitted action or button outcome associated with the submission.

comment.purpose: Comment entered with the submission, when applicable.

bp_instance_id.purpose: Process instance associated with the submission.

status.purpose: Submission status value; verify mapping before public reporting.

priority.purpose: Priority value associated with the submission.

prev_submission_id.purpose: Previous submission identifier in the process or task chain.

user_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the submitter.

unique_id.purpose: Stable unique identifier for the submission.

ip_address.purpose: IP address captured for the submission; treat as potentially sensitive.

history_id.purpose: Worker instance history row associated with the submission.

step_start_date.purpose: Timestamp when the related process step started.

is_test_mode.purpose: Flag indicating the submission was created in Forms test mode.

Columns containing JSON, JavaScript, CSS, component, or wrapper content are internal design payloads; avoid relying on their structure unless separately verified.

tags.purpose: Tags assigned to the form definition.

date_updated.purpose: Timestamp when the form definition was last changed.

is_public.purpose: Flag indicating whether the form is public.

auto_index.purpose: Auto-index setting for the form definition.

json_data.purpose: Serialized form design payload; structure should be verified before reporting.

preview_theme_id.purpose: Preview theme identifier assigned to the form.

friendly_name.purpose: Friendly display name for the form.

is_triggerform.purpose: Flag indicating whether the form can trigger a process.

created_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the form creator.

updated_by_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the account that last changed the form.

is_responsive.purpose: Flag indicating whether the form uses responsive design.

email_add.purpose: Email-related value for email add on the form definition record; review for sensitive content before reporting.

email_txt.purpose: Email-related value for email txt on the form definition record; review for sensitive content before reporting.

is_headershown.purpose: Flag indicating whether the form definition headershown.

friendly_form_id_col.purpose: Friendly Form Identifier Col for the form definition record.

custom_error_msg.purpose: Custom Error Msg for the form definition record.

validation_level.purpose: Validation Level setting for the form definition record.

pagination_options.purpose: Serialized or free-form pagination options payload for the form definition record; verify structure before reporting.

saveMode.purpose: Save Mode for the form definition record.

dbo.cf_bp_data.summary: Business process field or dataset values associated with process submissions.
safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only reporting only after validating field mappings and process context.
Use with cf_bp_dataset to resolve submitted value rows to field or process variable names for read-only reporting.
Use submitted process data value records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include user-entered or sensitive content.
warnings: Do not modify stored process data directly.
Column meaning should be documented with observed evidence before publication.
The value column can contain user-entered form data and may include sensitive information; do not publish raw values without review.

bp_data_id.purpose: Primary identifier for a submitted value row.

submission_id.purpose: Submission associated with this submitted value row.

attribute_id.purpose: Process data attribute identifier associated with the submitted value.

repeat_id.purpose: Repeat-section or collection instance identifier for repeated values.

value.purpose: Submitted value content; may include sensitive user-entered form data.

member_path.purpose: Path identifying a nested collection member for repeated or structured values.

dbo.cf_bp_worker_instance_history.summary: Historical record of worker instance execution and task assignment activity.
safeReportingNotes: Use for read-only audit-style reporting on process step timing, task assignment, completion, and due-date history.
Use worker instance history records for read-only Forms metadata reporting.
The status column stores string lifecycle/event values; use the documented value reference before aggregating task history states.
Status value mapping updated from Laserfiche Answers clarification.
warnings: Do not update worker instance history records directly.
Do not treat worker instance history status as the same mapping as cf_bp_worker_instances.status; history uses string event values.

history_id.purpose: Primary identifier for a worker instance history row.

instance_id.purpose: Worker instance identifier associated with this history row.

process_id.purpose: Process definition or process version identifier associated with this history row.

step_id.purpose: Step identifier associated with this history row.

start_date.purpose: Timestamp when the step or worker history segment started.

finish_date.purpose: Timestamp when the step or worker history segment finished.

status.purpose: Historical worker instance status string for step and task lifecycle events. Reference values: complete = 1 (step is complete), terminate = 2 (step was terminated), assigned = 3 (task was assigned to users), waiting = 4 (step is in waiting state), reassigned = 5 (task was reassigned), running = 6 (step is running), interrupted = 7 (step was interrupted by signal or timer), suspended = 8 (service task was suspended), claimed = 9 (user task was claimed by user), released = 10 (user task was released by user), taskSuspended = 11 (user task was suspended), AssignmentError = 12 (user task assignment failed because there were no valid approvers), Unused = 13 (currently unused), AssignedByRoundRobin = 14 (user task owner assigned automatically by round robin), DueDateEdited = 15 (due date modified), PriorityEdited = 16 (priority modified).

submission_id.purpose: Submission associated with this history row.

owner_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the task owner.

target_snapshot_id.purpose: User snapshot identifier for the target assignee or participant.

due_date.purpose: Due date assigned to the task or step.

current_priority.purpose: Priority value associated with the history row.

task_first_assigned_date.purpose: Timestamp when the task was first assigned.

approver_id.purpose: Approver identifier associated with the task history.

reminder_id.purpose: Reminder identifier associated with the task history.

external_op.purpose: External Op for the worker instance history record.

external_op_data1.purpose: Serialized or free-form external op data1 payload for the worker instance history record; verify structure before reporting.

archived_worker_instnc_to_resume.purpose: Archived Worker Instnc To Resume for the worker instance history record.

assigned_resume_id.purpose: Assigned Resume identifier associated with the worker instance history record.

assigned_comment.purpose: Assigned Comment for the worker instance history record.

sent_to_prediction_server.purpose: Sent To Prediction Server value for the worker instance history record.

safeReportingNotes: Join to cf_bp_data by attribute_id to label submitted value rows in read-only reports.
Use process data attribute definition records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include user-entered or sensitive content.
warnings: Do not update process data attribute definitions directly.

attribute_id.purpose: Primary identifier for a process data attribute.

process_id.purpose: Process definition or process version associated with the attribute.

attribute_name.purpose: Display or internal name for the process data attribute.

attribute_type.purpose: Data type or attribute category for the process data attribute.

x_path.purpose: XPath-like location for the attribute within Forms data.

is_deleted.purpose: Read-only soft-removal flag for the attribute definition.

is_user_in_summary.purpose: Flag indicating whether the attribute appears in user-facing summary output.

member_id.purpose: Member identifier for collection or nested data attributes.

warnings: Do not update dataset collection rows directly.

attribute_id.purpose: Child attribute identifier in a collection relationship.
